texto: we can gain experience from the past, but we cant relive it. But we can hope for the future, Its always along side us, on the inside of us looking out. The past should not be allowed to evaporate but should exist only in memories.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sean Sullivan sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “we can gain experience from the past, but we cant relive it. But we can hope for the future, Its …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, past, should, útil em momentos de reflexao.
